residual_risks: The active PR2 plan lives under ignored docs/plans/active/, so this GO must be preserved as durable .evidence/reviews/ evidence before implementation begins.
This is a plan review only; it does not validate future schema, validator, fixture, documentation, CI, or sample-work-unit implementation edits.

Offline validation can enforce a decision_reference shape and anti-agent names, but it cannot cryptographically prove the GitHub author identity without a separately approved online verification path.
If PR2 implementation changes mirrored SoT docs, live Confluence publication remains human-gated and outside local validation proof.
